SELECT "w"."Id", "w"."CategoryId", "w"."created_at", "w"."Description", "w"."display_name", "w"."Domain", "w"."IsActive", "w"."Name", "w"."url_sample", "c"."Id", "c"."Description", "c"."IsActive", "c"."Name", "c"."Slug", "c0"."Id", "c0"."AvgAccuracy", "c0"."AvgBiasNeutrality", "c0"."AvgSafetyTrust", "c0"."AvgTransparency", "c0"."ComputedAt", "c0"."RatingCount", "c0"."Score", "c0"."WebsiteId"

INNER JOIN "Categories" AS "c" ON "w"."CategoryId" = "c"."Id"

WHERE instr("w"."Domain", @normalizedQuery) > 0 OR instr(lower("w"."Name"), @ToLower) > 0

SELECT "r"."Id", "r"."Accuracy", "r"."BiasNeutrality", "r"."Comment", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."SafetyTrust", "r"."Transparency", "r"."UpdatedAt", "r"."UserId", "r"."WebsiteId", "w"."Id", "w"."CategoryId", "w"."created_at", "w"."Description", "w"."display_name", "w"."Domain", "w"."IsActive", "w"."Name", "w"."url_sample"
FROM "Ratings" AS "r"
INNER JOIN "Websites" AS "w" ON "r"."WebsiteId" = "w"."Id"
WHERE "r"."UserId" = @userId

FROM "OpenIddictTokens" AS "o"
LEFT JOIN "OpenIddictApplications" AS "o0" ON "o"."ApplicationId" = "o0"."Id"

WHERE "o"."ReferenceId" = @identifier
LIMIT 1
